description_long: This ornate sconce features a classic chandelier design with six elegantly curved arms radiating from a central, turned column. Each arm supports a candle-like light fixture, complete with faux wax drips and pointed, flame-shaped bulbs, all set atop dark, scalloped bobeches. The body is predominantly a smooth, matte white or light gray, with subtle decorative ridges and a robust, rounded finial at the base. The sconce is suspended from a sturdy metal chain, suggesting it is intended for ceiling mounting. The overall style is reminiscent of vintage or baroque lighting, with a focus on symmetry and decorative flourishes. The materials appear to be primarily painted metal or wood, with some plastic or glass elements for the bulbs.
description: A vintage-style chandelier sconce with six candle-like lights on curved arms, suspended by a chain and featuring ornate detailing in a matte white finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms symmetrically arranged, with the central column and chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the layered structure of the bobeches beneath each bulb.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the arms and the vertical alignment of the central column.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the rear curvature of the arms and the detailed finial at the base.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage chandelier style with ornate, curved arms and candle-like bulbs, evoking a baroque or classical aesthetic with a matte finish.
